issues.detail: The skill lacks error handling and edge case coverage, focusing mainly on happy path scenarios.
Installation steps use npm install without verifying package integrity via checksums.

scenarios.name: Fast scraping by blocking assets
scenarios.rationale: Baseline extracts data via page.evaluate but never calls setRequestInterception to abort image/font/stylesheet requests and uses waitUntil 'load' instead of 'networkidle2', while the treatment implements both the interception handler and the SPA-friendly wait condition.

scenarios.name: Stealth scraping with anti-bot bypass
scenarios.rationale: Baseline only spoofs a user agent and toggles headless: false, missing the puppeteer-extra-plugin-stealth plugin and the --disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled launch flag that the treatment uses to defeat detection.
